---
title: "ABCD-datacleaning"
output: html_document
date: "2025-02-17"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Packages
```{r, results = "hide", message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
# library
library(tidyverse)
library(psych)
library(VIM)
library(naniar)
```

```{r, results = "hide", message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
# Read data
cbcl <- read.csv('mh_p_cbcl.csv')
mania <- read.csv('mh_p_gbi.csv')
sleep <- read.csv('ph_p_sds.csv') 
```

#Imputation using kNN
```{r}
cbcl_imputed <- kNN(cbcl, k = 5)
cbcl_all <- cbcl_imputed %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname,cbcl_scr_syn_anxdep_r,cbcl_scr_syn_withdep_r,cbcl_scr_syn_somatic_r,cbcl_scr_syn_social_r,cbcl_scr_syn_thought_r,cbcl_scr_syn_attention_r,cbcl_scr_syn_rulebreak_r,cbcl_scr_syn_aggressive_r)
gg_miss_var(cbcl_all) # check if all were successfully imputed
```

# Merging sex from other data frame
```{r}
demo <- read.csv("abcd_p_demo.csv") %>% select(src_subject_id,eventname,demo_sex_v2)

# Fill missing sex and age values within each participant group
demo <- demo %>%
  group_by(src_subject_id) %>%
  mutate(demo_sex_v2 = first(na.omit(demo_sex_v2))) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
#1 = male, 2 = female, 3 = intersex/male

demo$eventname <- factor(demo$eventname, levels = c('baseline_year_1_arm_1', '1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1','2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1','3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1','4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1'), labels = c('baseline','1_year', '2_year', '3_year','4_year'))

cbcl_all$eventname <- factor(cbcl_all$eventname, levels = c('baseline_year_1_arm_1', '1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1','2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1','3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1','4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1'), labels = c('baseline','1_year', '2_year', '3_year','4_year'))

cbcl_all <- cbcl_all %>% inner_join(demo, by = c("src_subject_id","eventname"))
```


# Mania scale - imputation

```{r}
library(VIM)
mania_imputed <- kNN(mania, k = 5)
mania_all <- mania_imputed %>% select(1:13)
gg_miss_var(mania)
gg_miss_var(mania_all)
```

# Sleep scale - imputation

```{r}
library(VIM)
sleep_imputed <- kNN(sleep, k = 5)
sleep_all <- sleep_imputed %>% select(1:29)
gg_miss_var(sleep)
gg_miss_var(sleep_all)
```

# Harmonizing Likert scales
# Mania
```{r}
# Define transformation functions based on Chakrabartty (2020) recommendations for harmonizing likert scales
convert_to_equidistant <- function(x, max_scale) {
  (x - min(x, na.rm=T)) / (max(x, na.rm=T) - min(x, na.rm=T)) * (max_scale - 1)
}

z_score_transform <- function(x) {
  (x - mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)
}

rescale_to_0_2 <- function(x) {
  (x - min(x, na.rm = TRUE)) / (max(x, na.rm = TRUE) - min(x, na.rm = TRUE)) * 2
}

# Unified scaling and summation for Mania items
mania_selected <- mania_all %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("gen_child_behav"), 
                ~ rescale_to_0_2(z_score_transform(convert_to_equidistant(.x, 3))),
                .names = "{.col}_final")) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(Mania_Total = sum(c_across(ends_with("_final")), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(src_subject_id, eventname, Mania_Total)

head(mania_selected)
```

# Harmonizing Likert scales
# Sleep
```{r}
sleep_selected <- sleep_all %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("sleepdisturb"), 
                ~ rescale_to_0_2(z_score_transform(convert_to_equidistant(.x, 3))),
                .names = "{.col}_final")) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  # Summing specific dimensions as per your original selection
  mutate(sds_p_ss_dims_final = sum(c(sleepdisturb1_p_final, sleepdisturb2_p_final, 
                                    sleepdisturb3_p_final, sleepdisturb4_p_final, 
                                    sleepdisturb5_p_final, sleepdisturb10_p_final, 
                                    sleepdisturb11_p_final), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(src_subject_id, eventname, sds_p_ss_dims_final)

head(sleep_selected)
```

# NA's imputed, items scaled to 0-2 to match CBCL, sums recalculated

#rename eventname labels
```{r}
mania_selected$eventname <- factor(mania_selected$eventname, levels = c('baseline_year_1_arm_1', '1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1','2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1','3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1','4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1'), labels = c('baseline','1_year', '2_year', '3_year','4_year'))

sleep_selected$eventname <- factor(sleep_selected$eventname, levels = c('baseline_year_1_arm_1', '1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1','2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1','3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1','4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1'), labels = c('baseline','1_year', '2_year', '3_year','4_year'))
```

```{r}
#save as new csv for direct import to networks
#write.csv(cbcl_all, "cbcl_clean.csv")
#write.csv(mania_selected, "mania_cleaned.csv")
#write.csv(sleep_selected, "sleep_cleaned.csv")
```

```{r}
# Merge all domains into a single master dataframe
analysis_df <- cbcl_all %>%
  inner_join(sleep_selected, by = c("src_subject_id", "eventname")) %>%
  inner_join(mania_selected, by = c("src_subject_id", "eventname"))

analysis_df_baseline <- analysis_df %>%
  filter(eventname == "baseline")

# Final verification and export
#print(head(analysis_df))
#write.csv(analysis_df, "baseline_all_gen.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
